evals.name: health-authority-audit
evals.prompt: Review this health landing page for authority claims and propose safer credibility language.
evals.expected_output: Identifies relevant Influence principle, checks evidence, flags ethical risks, and provides concrete recommendations or rewrites without inventing proof.

evals.name: advisor-credential-presentation
evals.prompt: We have three advisors and two certifications. How should we present them without overstating authority?
evals.expected_output: Identifies relevant Influence principle, checks evidence, flags ethical risks, and provides concrete recommendations or rewrites without inventing proof.
